entry.title: Our Lab Members Attended SIGCOMM 2025
entry.content:
Minseok Kim, Daeun Lee, Yeon Ahn, Yunseo Jeong, and professor Young-bin Im attended SIGCOMM 2025, the world’s premier academic conference in the field of networking, held in Coimbra, Portugal.

During the conference, our members had the opportunity to observe presentations of cutting-edge research by world-renowned scholars and experience firsthand the latest trends in next-generation network technologies. It was a highly productive time, allowing us to gain deep insights into global research directions, particularly in our lab’s core focus areas. Building on the inspiration gained from the field, we will continue to strive for more innovative research achievements.
entry.summary: Minseok Kim, Daeun Lee, Yeon Ahn, Yunseo Jeong, and professor Young-bin Im attended SIGCOMM 2025, the world’s premier academic conference in the field of networking, held in Coimbra, Portugal. During the conference, our members had the opportunity to observe presentations of cutting-edge research by world-renowned scholars and experience firsthand the latest trends in next-generation network technologies. It was a highly productive time, allowing us to gain deep insights into global research directions, particularly in our lab’s core focus areas. Building on the inspiration gained from the field, we will continue to strive for more innovative research achievements.

entry.title: Welcome Yunseo :)
entry.content: Yunseo Jeong has joined the lab! Welcome, Yunseo!
entry.summary: Yunseo Jeong has joined the lab! Welcome, Yunseo!

entry.title: Hello world!
entry.content: Welcome to the N2SL! We study Large-Scale Network Systems and Next Generation Wireless Networking and Sensing System. The lab was established in September 2019 in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at UNIST.
entry.summary: Welcome to the N2SL! We study Large-Scale Network Systems and Next Generation Wireless Networking and Sensing System. The lab was established in September 2019 in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at UNIST.
